user.title: Keraunos Orages
user.description: Enter the 5-digit INSEE code of your commune (e.g. 67008 for Altorf). You can find it on the Keraunos website URL.

error.invalid_format: The INSEE code must be 5 characters (digits, or 2A/2B for Corsica).
error.invalid_insee: No commune matches this INSEE code.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach keraunos.org. Try again later.

init.title: Change commune
init.description: Enter a new 5-digit INSEE code for this commune.

error.invalid_format: The INSEE code must be 5 characters (digits, or 2A/2B for Corsica).
error.invalid_insee: No commune matches this INSEE code.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach keraunos.org. Try again later.
error.already_configured: Another entry already uses this commune.
